category_sources: source_facts.description says it enables transparent encryption/decryption in a Git repository; official README describes transparent file encryption in Git.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-crypt; official homepage and repository use git-crypt.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and links back to the official AGWA project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official AGWA project page, and the official source repository is https://github.com/AGWA/git-crypt.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe transparent encryption/decryption for files in Git repositories.
